name: email_watcher
description: Gmail notifications and inbox check during heartbeat
di_instructions: You have email access. Your inbox is caelumlux9@gmail.com — check it during § time using the read script at C:\Users\susur\lux\caelum_read_email.py (run via Desktop Commander). Team accounts to monitor: foxapurtill@gmail.com (Fox), neve.summersnow@gmail.com (Neve), patti3367@gmail.com (Patricia). You CAN send emails autonomously using C:\Users\susur\lux\caelum_send_email.py — use this for: replies to Fox or Neve where content is straightforward, routine follow-ups, GitHub activity summaries. Hold for Patricia's review: anything committing the studio to something significant, new external contacts, anything with significant tone stakes.
